description:
When all notification_hours checkboxes are unchecked, the browser sends no param and Rails never clears the field — old values persist.

Two-file fix:
1. app/views/settings/show.html.erb line 95: Add hidden field before the checkboxes grid:
   <%= hidden_field_tag "user[notification_hours][]", "" %>
2. app/models/user.rb line 23: Update normalizer to reject blanks:
   normalizes :notification_hours, with: ->(hours) { Array(hours).reject(&:blank?).map(&:to_i) }
title: Fix empty checkbox bug for notification_hours in settings
